creator: juha.ylitalo@iki.fi
text:
It seems that this PR can really be closed as something that got fixed
into 4.5-RELEASE. I just experimented things (with different DVD, but
...) and even though I am still able to crash my system with mplayer, it
now manages to get disc information correctly and play some of it, xine
is not able to crash my system at all and with ogle, which gives me best
results on DVD player, all my problems looks like something that is ogle
related.

-- 
Juha Ylitalo                 juha.ylitalo@iki.fi                <e-mail>
"Some tools are used, because its policy, others because they are good."
